gap_summaries: [ultrathink] 🔴 FIXED: Hard-coded collector count 22 was wrong — M5 has 14 collectors (correctness:4 + docs:3 + process:2 + static:5), not 13. Updated all assertions to 25 (14 M5 + 11 M6).

[ultrathink] 🟡 FIXED: Missing conftest-compliance collector — spec §6.2 says 'compliance rulepack (semgrep/conftest)' but plan only had semgrep. Added CONFTEST collector with configurable policy_dir, tests, and updated compliance module from 1 to 2 collectors.

[ultrathink] 🟡 FIXED: Missing trivy-sbom-supply_chain collector — spec §6.2 lists Trivy as supply_chain evidence source for SBOM-level vulnerability scanning. Added TRIVY_SBOM collector with configurable severity, tests, and updated supply_chain module from 3 to 4 collectors.

[ultrathink] 🟡 FIXED: parse_syft_output in license_check.py crashed if licenses[0] was not a dict (no isinstance guard). Added type guard: first_lic = licenses[0] if licenses else {}; license_val = first_lic.get('value', '') if isinstance(first_lic, dict) else ''.

[ultrathink] 🟡 FIXED: cosign artifact path was hardcoded as 'sbom.json'. Made configurable via profile.rules.supply_chain.cosign_artifact with default 'sbom.json'. Added test_build_cmd_custom_artifact test.
[ultrathink] 🔵 FIXED: parse_syft_output return type annotation was dict[str, str] but values include list[str]. Changed to list[dict] matching actual return shape.
[ultrathink] 🔵 FIXED: Provenance test was missing file-existence assertion for presence_check.py (inconsistent with license/sbom collector tests). Added test_check_script_path_exists method.
